name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit positions itself as a PE-backed 'Experience Intelligence' group combining CX consulting with AI/data science capabilities acquired through Profusion and Amplify Analytix. Their methodology centers on GenAI-powered analytics layered onto experience management programs, targeting enterprise clients in financial services and retail. Delivery model is hybrid onshore (EU) and offshore (India), with thought leadership focused on the convergence of behavioral data science and customer journey optimization. The group's content emphasizes scalable, tech-enabled CX transformation rather than boutique advisory.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta's methodology is deeply anchored in SAP ecosystem integration, positioning Qualtrics as the experience layer embedded within SAP operational workflows. Their AI approach focuses on contextual analytics surfaced within SAP UIs rather than standalone dashboards. Delivery model is DACH-centric with enterprise consulting engagements, emphasizing rapid time-to-value through pre-built SAP connectors. Thought leadership themes center on bridging operational (O-data) and experience (X-data) within existing SAP landscapes.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics operates as a Qualtrics-centric implementation partner specializing in government and public sector CX in the GCC region. Their methodology emphasizes CX maturity assessments, national-level experience measurement frameworks, and program governance for large-scale citizen experience initiatives. AI approach is primarily through Qualtrics' native analytics capabilities applied to Arabic-language feedback programs. Delivery model combines on-the-ground consulting in Saudi Arabia and UAE with Qualtrics technical deployment expertise.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX combines global research expertise with technology-enabled experience measurement, leveraging Medallia as its primary XM platform partner. Their methodology is rooted in behavioral science and advanced analytics, with proprietary frameworks for loyalty prediction and customer value modeling. AI approach integrates NLP-driven text analytics and predictive modeling within large-scale VoC programs. Thought leadership focuses on connecting CX metrics to financial outcomes, with particular strength in cross-industry benchmarking and longitudinal studies.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont is a US-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner focused on end-to-end XM program implementation, optimization, and managed services. Their methodology emphasizes technical excellence in Qualtrics platform configuration, integration, and advanced survey design. AI approach leverages Qualtrics' native AI features (Text iQ, Stats iQ) with custom dashboard development. Blog content is practical and implementation-focused, targeting CX program managers seeking hands-on Qualtrics guidance rather than high-level strategic thought leadership.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak is a UK-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner offering XM program design, implementation, and managed services across the UK and EU. Their methodology focuses on employee experience and customer experience program maturity, with particular emphasis on financial services and public sector verticals. AI approach is primarily through Qualtrics-native analytics. Content cadence is infrequent, with thought leadership focused on practical program governance and stakeholder adoption rather than cutting-edge technology positioning.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap is a Spanish-origin CX and EX consultancy with strong presence across Iberoamerica. Their methodology centers on journey mapping (both customer and employee) with proprietary frameworks for measuring experience impact on business outcomes. They maintain a balanced CX/EX practice, with increasing emphasis on employee experience as a differentiator. Delivery model is consulting-led across Spain and Latin America, with thought leadership themes spanning hybrid work design, internal culture transformation, and customer-centric organizational change.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo positions itself as the leading CX consultancy across Iberoamerica with Qualtrics certification as a core technical credential. Their methodology blends strategic CX advisory (journey mapping, CX governance, experience design) with Qualtrics platform implementation. AI approach is channeled through Qualtrics analytics capabilities and proprietary benchmarking across Spanish-speaking markets. Thought leadership themes focus on CX maturity models, digital experience transformation, and scaling VoC programs across multi-country operations in banking and telecommunications.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant's Connected Experiences Studio operates within a large-scale digital transformation company, positioning CX as one dimension of end-to-end digital engineering. Their approach emphasizes technology-driven experience design backed by data analytics and AI engineering capabilities at enterprise scale. Delivery model leverages Globant's global engineering workforce with nearshore Latin American delivery centers. CX thought leadership is embedded within broader digital transformation narratives rather than positioned as standalone advisory, making them more of a technology implementer than a CX strategy consultancy.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Vocé Group
blog_profile: No digital presence available for analysis. Vocé Group remains undetectable across web search, LinkedIn, and CX industry directories. Likely operates through private referral networks or may have been acquired, dissolved, or rebranded under a different entity.

name: Zill Consulting
blog_profile: No digital presence available for analysis. Zill Consulting remains undetectable across web search, LinkedIn, and CX industry directories. Likely operates through private referral networks or may be a very small boutique with no public-facing content strategy.

name: Act XM
blog_profile: No digital presence available for analysis. Act XM remains undetectable across web search, LinkedIn, and CX industry directories. May operate under a different legal name or as a division of another entity without independent public branding.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy is a Canada/US-based Qualtrics partner focused on enterprise XM program design and implementation. Their case study portfolio emphasizes cross-industry deployments for major brands (CrowdStrike, WestJet, OLG), suggesting strength in complex multi-stakeholder programs. Delivery model appears to be consulting-led with deep Qualtrics platform expertise. Limited independent thought leadership content, with primary visibility through Qualtrics' own partner ecosystem rather than proprietary content marketing.
